titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of the President, Yale University, Annual and Special Reports
Office of the President, Yale University, Annual and Special Reports
titlestmt.author: compiled by Mark Bailey

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday May 12, 2020 at 07:01
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Office of the President, Yale University, annual and special reports
did.abstract: Series I consists of annual reports and related documentation sent to President Kingman Brewster, Jr., from academic and non-academic departments, graduate and professional schools, and residential colleges. Series II includes reports, drafts, background materials, and correspondence of the Dahl Committee on Undergraduate Education and the Dominguez Study Commission on Governance.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 2-A (YRG 2-A), Records of the President.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Office of the President, 1973, 1976-1977.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The records in this collection are partially restricted. See collection contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of the President, Yale University, Annual and Special Reports (RU 12). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged in two series: I. Annual Reports, 1964-1977; II. Special Reports, 1968-1973.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series I consists of annual reports and related documentation sent to President Kingman Brewster, Jr., from academic and non-academic departments, graduate and professional schools, and residential colleges. Series II includes reports, drafts, background materials, and correspondence of the Dahl Committee on Undergraduate Education and the Dominguez Study Commission on Governance.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The report files in this series (14.5 linear feet) are organized in four sections: academic departments, graduate and professional schools, non-academic departments, and residential colleges. Each section is arranged alphabetically and chronologically thereunder. The files consist of reports sent annually to President Kingman Brewster, Jr., for his review and approval, as well as related correspondence and memoranda. Some report files which predate 1970 are included in Series I of the Brewster Presidential Records (YRU 11) under "reports."

did.unittitle: British Art and British Studies, Paul Mellon Center for

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also: Southeast Asian Studies, box 26, folder 481

did.unittitle: Mid-Career Program in City School Administration
Research in the Economics of Higher Education

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also: East Asian Studies, box 22, folders 416-418

did.unittitle: Summer School of Music and Art (Norfolk)
Western Regional Office of Yale University

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Special Reports series (1 linear foot) includes the presidential records of the Dahl Committee on Undergraduate Education (published as the Study Group on Yale College) and the Dominguez Study Commission on Governance. The Dahl Committee, headed by Yale Political Science Professor Robert A. Dahl, was appointed by President Kingman Brewster, Jr., in April 1971 to make recommendations on Yale College education. The files include background materials and reports, correspondence, drafts, and the final published report with annotated sections designated for the Yale Alumni Magazine . In 1969 Brewster appointed a Summer study group headed by Jorg Dominguez to begin addressing issues of governance at Yale University. The committee produced a series of position papers and recommended the formation of a sixty member governance commission. The files include background materials, drafts, correspondence, organizational documents, and final copies of the committee's position papers. The folders in this series are arranged alphabetically under each commission.

did.unittitle: Report of the Study Group on Yale College [Dahl Report]
Notes on Models of University Governance [Dominguez Report]
Notes on Participation in the Governance of Yale University [Dominguez Report cont'd]

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
